title: Sweet Juicy Chinese Tiger Prawns Bao
description: Indulge in the flavors of China with our sweet and juicy tiger prawns bao, served in a soft and fluffy steamed bun.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and sauté with the prawns

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Mince and sauté with the prawns

ingredients.name: Scallions
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice and use as garnish

instructions: Marinate the prawns in light soy sauce, mirin, and brown sugar for at least 30 minutes.
Mix cornstarch with a pinch of salt and coat the prawns evenly.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the prawns and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add minced garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the cooked prawns back into the wok and stir-fry for another minute.
Steam the bao buns according to the package instructions.
Assemble the baos by placing a few prawns onto each bun, followed by a drizzle of the stir-fry sauce.
Garnish with thinly sliced scallions and serve immediately.
